top_signals.title: U.S. sanctions Nobitex crypto exchange used by Iranian ransomware actors
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has announced sanctions against Nobitex, Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, for facilitating payments related to terrorist activities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Copper Climbs as Declining Inventories Offset Worries Over Iran
top_signals.summary: Copper edged higher after a rise in orders for metal in London Metal Exchange warehouses, bucking a broader downtrend on the exchange as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s fraught push to reach a peace deal with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Business Warns Johannesburg Crisis Risks South African Recovery
top_signals.summary: South African business leaders warned that Johannesburg’s deepening fiscal and governance crisis risks undermining the country’s improving economic outlook, calling for urgent action to rebuild the nation’s commercial capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
top_signals.summary: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office said only 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cisco warns of critical Unified CM flaw with PoC exploit code

top_signals.title: Ares’ Jacobson Slams ‘Disconnect’ Over Private Credit Headlines
top_signals.summary: Ares Management Corporation’s co-president Blair Jacobson said there’s a “real disconnect” between negative headlines about private credit and what the firm is seeing across its portfolio companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
top_signals.summary: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s wealth fund to tap alternative assets with Tokyo office
top_signals.summary: It will be the fund's sixth overseas outpost, joining offices in New York, London, Singapore, Mumbai and San Francisco.
